title: Sophonics LoRA Int5 DeepMLP non-record submission
author: DesperateTomatoCultivator

data.description: Tied embeddings in the base GPT model.

data.scope: reference precision during repair and final artifact

data.description: LoRA repair modules trained on the deepest two MLP blocks and then merged back into ordinary checkpoint weights.

novel_contributions: Unlimited-compute non-record submission under the 16MB artifact cap
Train a compact tied-embedding GPT base model
Use an int5 repair substrate with rank-16 LoRA modules on the deepest MLP blocks
Merge repair weights back into standard checkpoint weights before final quantization
Quantize the merged checkpoint to int8 and zlib-compress it
Demonstrate that localized learned repair can recover most of the int5-to-int8 performance gap
